headline: Adjustments to Iso, Yoru, and Outlaw, and punishing rank manipulators.

changes.line: Iso buff to weapon equip speed after unequipping Double Tap
Yoru buff with an increase in duration of Gatecrash
Outlaw adjustment to allow for more expression and control
To further satisfy his deception fantasy, clones from Fakeout will now hold Yoru's last equipped weapon, instead of defaulting to his strongest weapon.
Outlaw has been performing strongly and we still want it to feel powerful with its back-to-back shots, but allow for some expression and some control to warrant that power.
Fixed an issue where Astra's ability cooldown timer could sometimes remain visible after the ability had already been used.
Fixed an issue where Clove could gain an extra charge of Ruse during the Buy Phase by purchasing and reselling ability charges.
Fixed an issue where Cyber Cage's trajectory indicator would not appear when throwing the ability into locations outside of Cypher's line of sight.
Fixed an inconsistency where Jett could not pick up the Spike or weapons during Tailwind .
Fixed an issue on Split where Killjoy's Alarmbot could interact with players through certain wooden covers.
Fixed an issue where Miks could gain an extra charge of Waveform during the Buy Phase by purchasing and reselling ability charges.
Fixed an issue where Neon could be unable to pick up the Spike while sliding over it.
Fixed an issue where Dismiss could occasionally leave Reyna unable to equip a weapon.
Fixed an issue on Abyss where Leer could apply its blind effect in unintended locations near A Main.
Fixed an issue where players revived by Sage inside Viper's Pit or Poison Cloud would not correctly receive the nearsighted debuff.
Fixed an issue where Skye could gain an extra charge of Guiding Light during the Buy Phase by purchasing and reselling ability charges.
Fixed an issue where players using controllable abilities could briefly see through Viper's Pit .
Fixed an issue that allowed Yoru to gain unintended movement speed while in Dimensional Drift when interacting with Flex/Totems.
Fixed an issue where Iso could survive the falling door crush.
Fixed an issue where Waylay could reach unintended locations using Refract and Lightspeed .
